message:
fix: handle mail send failures in resetAbandonedBead with nudge fallback (gt-x8f0)

Both SPAWN_BLOCKED and RECOVERED_BEAD mail sends were silenced with blank
identifier (_ = router.Send). If mail fails, the bead gets reset to open
but the deacon/mayor never learns about it, causing orphaned beads.

Now logs errors to stderr and falls back to nudging the appropriate agent
(mayor for SPAWN_BLOCKED, deacon for RECOVERED_BEAD) since nudges are
more reliable than mail for notification.
